sections.title: (1) The seal of the Agency kept in terms of the Patents
sections.body:
Act No. 15
of 2010 and Companies Registration Agency Act, 2010, shall be
used for the purposes of this Act and the impression thereof
made for such purposes shall be judicially noticed.
(2) On the commencement of this Act, any impression of a
seal made for the purposes of this Act before the
commencement of this Act shall be deemed to be an
impression of the seal of the Agency.
